entry.title: duanyf-first-blog
entry.content:
这几个教程挺不错，帮助我搭建了这个网页：
1.https://blog.csdn.net/mokuta/article/details/159281710
2.https://zhuanlan.zhihu.com/p/392994381
3.https://saiumr.github.io/2025/02/23/%E5%88%A9%E7%94%A8github%E6%90%AD%E5%BB%BA%E4%B8%AA%E4%BA%BA%E5%8D%9A%E5%AE%A2/
4.https://theme-next.js.org/docs/theme-settings/
5.https://pengtech.net/hexo/hexo_theme_recommendation.html
